benefits.description: Significant relief from sciatic-like pain in left calf after 5.5 months of limping. Pain reduction in bilateral legs.
Walking ability restored, able to walk around neighborhood at normal pace. Typing and computer use pain nearly eliminated.
Improved flexibility and pain tolerance during physical therapy workouts. Better tolerance for activity.

protocol_notes: Started September 2, 2022. Injected subcutaneously in belly fat area. Discontinued Advil and painkillers around same time. Was also receiving massage therapy and physical therapy concurrently. Had issues getting rid of air bubbles in measurements, so actual dose may vary slightly. Updated at 1.5 months with continued improvements. Considering adding TB-500 to stack.
